name: hello-gorgeous-videos
description: Hello Gorgeous Med Spa promotional videos

scripts.trifecta:all: remotion render src/index.tsx TrifectaRevealVertical out/trifecta-reel.mp4 && remotion render src/index.tsx TrifectaRevealSquare out/trifecta-feed.mp4 && remotion render src/index.tsx TrifectaRevealHorizontal out/trifecta-landscape.mp4
scripts.semaglutide:all: remotion render src/index.tsx SemaglutideSpringBreakSquare out/semaglutide-spring-break-gmb.mp4 && remotion render src/index.tsx SemaglutideSpringBreakVertical out/semaglutide-spring-break-reel.mp4 && remotion render src/index.tsx SemaglutideSpringBreakHorizontal out/semaglutide-spring-break-landscape.mp4
scripts.lipfiller:all: remotion render src/index.tsx LipFillerShowcaseVertical out/lip-filler-reel.mp4 && remotion render src/index.tsx LipFillerShowcaseSquare out/lip-filler-feed.mp4
scripts.vipmodel:all: remotion render src/index.tsx VIPModelVertical out/vip-model-reel.mp4 && remotion render src/index.tsx VIPModelSquare out/vip-model-feed.mp4 && remotion render src/index.tsx VIPModelHorizontal out/vip-model-landscape.mp4
scripts.morpheus8burst:all: remotion render src/index.tsx Morpheus8BurstVertical out/morpheus8-burst-reel.mp4 && remotion render src/index.tsx Morpheus8BurstSquare out/morpheus8-burst-feed.mp4 && remotion render src/index.tsx Morpheus8BurstHorizontal out/morpheus8-burst-landscape.mp4
